review_text: Exceptional quality! Ordered Jeera Rice  Lamb Rogan Josh  Fish Curry  and Chicken Tikka Masala and everything was delicious. The Chicken Tikka Masala melted in my mouth. Perfect!
Perfect in every way! Malai Kofta  Mango Lassi  and Fish Curry were all excellent. Mango Lassi stood out with its rich  authentic taste.

Absolutely amazing Paneer Butter Masala  Vegetable Biryani  Kulfi  Butter Chicken  and Gulab Jamun (2 pcs)! The Gulab Jamun (2 pcs) was cooked to perfection. Fresh ingredients and authentic flavors. Highly recommend!

Best Indian food in UAE! Chicken Seekh Kebab  Butter Chicken  Chicken Tikka Masala  Dal Makhani  and Paneer Butter Masala were incredible. Paneer Butter Masala had the perfect balance of spices. Five stars!
Outstanding experience! The Naan  Fresh Lime Soda  Palak Paneer  Chicken Tikka Masala  and Mango Lassi exceeded all expectations. Palak Paneer was the star of the meal. Will definitely order again!
Enjoyed the Paneer Tikka  Dal Makhani  Butter Naan  Chicken Biryani  and Garlic Naan! Garlic Naan was very good. Portion sizes were generous. Recommend!
Decent food but nothing special. Fish Curry and Mango Lassi were okay. Mango Lassi lacked the punch I expected.
Outstanding experience! The Aloo Tikki Chaat and Chicken Biryani exceeded all expectations. Chicken Biryani was the star of the meal. Will definitely order again!
